briefs.title: Liquor Licence Renewal Fees Rising for First Time Since 2010 — Effective May 1, 2026
briefs.summary: BC's Liquor and Cannabis Regulation Branch is raising annual liquor licence renewal fees starting May 1, 2026. Most hospitality businesses will pay about $75 more per year; manufacturer increases vary by production size.
briefs.action_required: Review the updated fee table and budget for your higher renewal fee before May 1, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC LCRB liquor licence renewal fee increase takes effect
BC Serving It Right and Special Event Server training fee increase takes effect
